title: Tick Control in Rye, NY | Professional Tick Extermination | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Rye, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Expert treatment starting at $125. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Rye's beautiful tree-lined streets, proximity to waterfront parks, and lush residential properties create ideal habitats for ticks that threaten your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Rye, from the estates near Milton Harbor to homes surrounding Rye Nature Center and Oakland Beach. Our proven tick elimination methods protect Rye residents from Lyme disease and other dangerous tick-borne illnesses year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Westchester County with specialized tick treatment programs tailored to Rye's unique coastal and wooded environment. Our certified technicians use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques to provide safe, effective tick control for your property while protecting your children, pets, and local wildlife.
localContext: Rye's mix of historic properties, the heavily wooded areas around Marshlands Conservancy, and proximity to Playland Park and recreation areas creates prime tick habitat throughout the community. Properties near Purchase Street, along the Boston Post Road corridor, and surrounding Rye Golf Club require vigilant tick control to ensure safe outdoor enjoyment of Rye's exceptional quality of life.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Rye, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Rye typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in late spring and early fall. However, mild winters near the Long Island Sound can lead to year-round tick presence. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring and maintaining regular treatments throughout the season for optimal protection.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Rye?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Rye range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single applications, seasonal packages, and year-round protection plans. Each service includes a thorough property inspection and targeted treatment of tick-prone areas like wooded borders, stone walls, and shaded landscape beds.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products specifically designed for residential tick control that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We recommend keeping children and pets off treated areas for 2-3 hours until the application dries, after which the area is completely safe for normal use.

faqs.question: What areas of my Rye property need tick treatment?
faqs.answer: We focus on high-risk areas where ticks live and wait for hosts: the perimeter of wooded areas, along stone walls and fences, in ground cover and mulched beds, around ornamental grasses, and transitional zones between lawn and brush. Properties near Rye Nature Center, along the Sound Shore, or backing to conservation areas require comprehensive perimeter treatments to create an effective tick barrier.
